description: Show your support for Ukraine with our activism-inspired dark mode email template. Designed to rally your community around a noble cause, this template is perfect for non-profit organizations aiming to raise funds and spread peace through a clothing drive. Use this powerful tool to communicate your "No War" message, inspire action, and generate donations. Its dark mode design keeps the focus on the content, ensuring your audience is captivated by your call to stand with Ukraine. Whether you're a fundraising expert or a novice, this template simplifies the process, allowing you to make a tangible difference in the world.
short_description: Join the cause with our activism-inspired dark mode email template, perfect for non-profits aiming to raise funds and promote peace through a clothing drive. Stand with Ukraine, spread your "No War" message, and inspire action. Simplifying fundraising, this template keeps focus on content, ensuring your call to action captivates your audience.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

html_data:
The events happening in Ukraine are terrifying, inhumane, and devastating. Everyday civilians are having to flee their homes with nothing but the clothes on their back. To show that we stand with Ukraine and offer support, we will be holding a fundraiser and clothing drive March 10 - March 15.

Learn More About Ukraine
 
 

Donate clothes

Over the next week we will have several locations set up where you can bring clothes that you no longer need so we can help those fleeing Ukraine. They are in the midst of winter and some left with nothing but a t-shirt. While we will take any donations, there are a few highly requested items:

Winter clothes

Socks

Jeans

Sweatshirts
 
Find a Drop Off Location
 
 

Looking for other ways to help?

If you don't have clothes to donate but are still wanting to help, here are a other ways you can support Ukraine.

Volunteer at one of our

drop-off location
